userStories.title: Code review and bug analysis
userStories.description: Review App.js for potential bugs, edge cases, and code quality issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Identify any potential bugs or crashes
Check for memory leaks (useEffect cleanup, subscriptions)
Check for edge cases in GPS tracking
userStories.notes: Discovery phase - understand current code quality

userStories.title: Performance optimization
userStories.description: Optimize app performance for smooth tracking experience.
userStories.notes: GPS apps need to be performant to avoid battery drain

userStories.title: Error handling improvements
userStories.description: Add robust error handling for GPS, storage, and export failures.
acceptanceCriteria: Add try-catch around Location API calls
Add error handling for file export
userStories.notes: App Store rejects apps that crash on common scenarios

userStories.title: UX improvements
userStories.description: Polish the user experience for App Store quality.
acceptanceCriteria: Add haptic feedback on button presses
Ensure proper keyboard avoidance if any inputs added
userStories.notes: CHECKPOINT: Review UX changes before continuing

userStories.title: Battery optimization
userStories.description: Optimize battery usage during tracking sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Consider adaptive accuracy based on speed
Document battery impact of current settings
userStories.notes: GPS apps are notorious for battery drain

userStories.title: Data persistence
userStories.description: Add ability to save and resume tracking sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Save tracking state to AsyncStorage periodically
Allow resuming if app is killed during tracking
userStories.notes: Users expect to not lose data if app crashes

userStories.title: App Store readiness
userStories.description: Final polish for App Store submission.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify all required permissions are properly described
userStories.notes: CHECKPOINT: Final review before App Store submission

metadata.objective: Optimize Go Tracker app for App Store submission - improve performance, error handling, UX, and battery usage
